plugins.name: autonomous-execution
plugins.description: Instructs Claude to complete tasks autonomously by executing, verifying, diagnosing, and fixing — rather than asking the user to check things

plugins.name: doc-harvest
plugins.description: Scrape documentation websites into structured Claude Context Library entries with progressive disclosure navigation

plugins.name: internet-skill-finder
plugins.description: Search and recommend Agent Skills from 7 verified GitHub repositories

plugins.name: macos-automation
plugins.description: Teach Claude how to automate Apple's native macOS apps (Mail, Calendar, Notes, Reminders) using AppleScript, JXA, and Swift

plugins.name: openclaw-cli
plugins.description: OpenClaw CLI reference for managing Talia's gateway on Raspberry Pi — config, gateway, cron, and security commands

plugins.name: pippin
plugins.description: Pippin integration — bundles the pippin MCP server (26 tools for mail, calendar, reminders, contacts, notes, status, doctor) plus a CLI skill for shell-level usage

plugins.name: swift-concurrency
plugins.description: Swift 6.2 concurrency patterns, proactive code review, and migration planning for modern Swift async/await, actors, and Sendable

plugins.name: calendar-organizer
plugins.description: Extract, clean, and organize calendar schedules from messy sources into structured calendar data

plugins.name: talia-connector
plugins.description: MCP bridge to Talia (personal AI assistant) via OpenClaw on Raspberry Pi — provides ask, status, memory search, sessions, cron, and messaging tools

plugins.name: remote-tasks
plugins.description: Async cross-machine task delegation via SSH and Beads — delegate work to Raspberry Pi and Pironman workers over Tailscale

plugins.name: obsidian-homelab
plugins.description: Obsidian vault intelligence, homelab operations, and daily workflows for personal knowledge management and infrastructure.

plugins.name: xcode-mcp
plugins.description: Teach Claude Code to effectively use the Xcode MCP bridge for building, testing, fixing, and managing Xcode projects via natural-language requests

plugins.name: testflight-triage
plugins.description: Scrape Apple App Store Connect TestFlight (crashes, feedback, builds, testers) via Chrome automation and triage into beads issues for backlog tracking
